name_cn:
Genuine quality
5BE090, Miu's new bucket bag, continuing the lazy and sexy trend from last season, another hot🔥 style. Top-grade imported calfskin, fine and smooth leather surface, premium texture, casual and lightweight body, soft yet structured. Adjustable shoulder strap design, more refined and practical. Good temperament, casual and lazy, 100% head-turner for daily wear. Hand-stitched leather logo on the surface, brand new linen lining inside. Dimensions 16X 22.5X14Cm, comes with original packaging.
